sentences.arabic: جُعْتُ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ طَوِيلٍ مِنَ التَّجْوَالِ فَبَحَثْتُ عَنْ مَطْعَمٍ قَرِيبٍ.
sentences.translation: Ogladnio sam nakon dugog dana lutanja i potražio sam obližnji restoran.
sentences.translationEn: I got hungry after a long day of wandering and looked for a nearby restaurant.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدْتُ مَطْعَمًا صَغِيرًا يُقَدِّمُ الأَكْلَ الْمَحَلِّيَّ التَّقْلِيدِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao sam mali restoran koji nudi tradicionalnu lokalnu hranu.
sentences.translationEn: I found a small restaurant offering traditional local food.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبْتُ مِنَ النَّادِلِ أَنْ يَنْصَحَنِي بِأَفْضَلِ الأَطْبَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio sam konobara da mi preporuči najbolja jela.
sentences.translationEn: I asked the waiter to recommend the best dishes.

sentences.arabic: جَرَّبْتُ حَسَاءَ الْعَدَسِ وَالْخُبْزَ الطَّازَجَ مَعَ الزَّيْتُونِ.
sentences.translation: Probao sam sočivo u čorbi i svježi hljeb s maslinama.
sentences.translationEn: I tried lentil soup and fresh bread with olives.

sentences.translation: Hrana je bila ukusna, a cijena razumna.
sentences.translationEn: The food was delicious and the price was reasonable.
